Off Calendar Feb-20-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Neal Konami, Esq. 415-274-0956, appearing for Kim Konami, Plaintiff and opposing party.

Anderson Franco, Esq. of de la pena & Holiday, LLP, 415-268-8000, appearing for Defendant

John Kithas, Esq. and Christopher Land, Esq., 415-788-8100, appearing for Annika Rodriguez, Defendant and moving party.

Hearing Held. Mr. Konami argued that there was a global settlement and that Annika was not part of that settlement because she was dismissed out.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ANNIKA RODRIGUEZ Motion Of Defendant Annika Rodriguez For Attorneys Fees is GRANTED as requested. This defendant is a prevailing party vis-a-vis plaintiff in this action. CCP 1032(a)(4) "a defendant as against those plaintiff who do not recover any relief against that defendant." She is entitled to recover her fees under SFRO 37.9(f) as she was sued as "a person who willfully assists the landlord to endeavor to recover possession or to evict a tenant'") SFRO 37.9(e). DeSaulles v. Community Hospital of Monterey Peninsula (2016) 62 Cal.4th 1140 is inapplicable. Order for the same signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
